phases.notes: SEMARNAT coastal zone permit is the critical path item. Process initiated in Phase 2 in parallel to minimize schedule impact. Estimated SEMARNAT resolution: 3-6 months from application submission. Municipal permit typically 4-8 weeks after executive plans.

notes: Phase 6 (SEMARNAT permit) runs in parallel starting Phase 2. Construction timeline (typically 10-18 months for a 356 sqm coastal residence) is not included in this schedule and will be set by the selected contractor.
